entities.name: HINGOLI DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Maharashtra where the study was conducted

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: SHRINK-SWELL SOILS
entities.description: Soils that undergo significant volume changes with moisture variation

entities.name: RED VERTISOLS
entities.description: Red colored shrink-swell soils with Vertisol characteristics

entities.name: GRAY VERTISOLS
entities.description: Gray colored shrink-swell soils with Vertisol characteristics

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A soil order characterized by high shrink-swell capacity

entities.name: HYDRAULIC CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: The ease with which water moves through the soil

entities.name: MG2+
entities.description: Magnesium ion present in the exchange complex and released from palygorskite

entities.name: NA+
entities.description: Sodium ion present in the exchange complex

entities.name: EXCHANGE COMPLEX
entities.description: The part of the soil capable of exchanging cations

entities.name: SMECTITE
entities.description: A dominant clay mineral in both red and gray Vertisols

entities.name: KAOLIN
entities.description: A clay mineral found in gray Vertisols resulting from smectite transformation

entities.name: HUMID CLIMATE
entities.description: Past climatic condition that facilitated the transformation of smectite to kaolin

entities.name: RED BOLE
entities.description: The parent material from which the red Vertisols were formed

entities.name: PALYGORSKITE
entities.description: A mineral found in red shrink-swell soils and red boles

entities.name: ARID CLIMATE
entities.description: A dry climatic condition for which palygorskite is not an index mineral

entities.name: IMPEDED DRAINAGE
entities.description: Poor water movement in soil caused by clay dispersion and pore clogging

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops, which is adversely affected by impeded drainage

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL STUDY
entities.description: Analysis of the physical form and structure of the soils

entities.name: PHYSICAL STUDY
entities.description: Analysis of the physical properties of the soils

entities.name: CHEMICAL STUDY
entities.description: Analysis of the chemical properties of the soils

entities.name: MINERALOGICAL STUDY
entities.description: Analysis of the mineral composition of the soils
